title: Tactical M4 Bow
description: Turns the bow into a tactical M4!
body:
# Tactical M4 Bow!
![What it looks like in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461ead4b27545a9c25a3583fdad2d7902f141907.png)

This texturepack changes the bow into a tactical M4! It also changes the arrow texture to look like a bullet! This is a revamp/remake of my old M4, I changed the model and sounds to make it look more realistic

**This does change the bow sound as well which also affects item throwing sounds!**
